name: workflow
description: Development lifecycle and release management. v{x}.{y}.{z}-dev.{i} branching with explicit rebase/squash decision tree, the automated patch-release pipeline (release.yml: tag, release, next-patch cut, mod-10 cascade version bump, dev.0, orphan sweep, milestone roll), GH issue/PR/milestone conventions, Rust workspace crate scaffolding policy (cross-refs rust/cargo.md for cargo mechanics), and the version/sprint plan-file structure.
